user_query: I'm searching for a property to rent in Portugal and I need one with a terrace and private toilet. Can you provide me with a list of available rental properties in Lisbon? Also, I would like to know the details of a specific zone of interest with the zoiId 'metro-porta-romana'.

TaskList.description: Retrieve a list of available rental properties in Lisbon that have a terrace and a private toilet.
Get details of the specific zone of interest with the zoiId 'metro-porta-romana'.
